intended_use: SwiftMR is a stand-alone software solution intended to be used for acceptance, enhancement and transfer of brain MRI images in DICOM format. It can be used for noise reduction and increasing image sha
intended_use_full: SwiftMR is a stand-alone software solution intended to be used for acceptance, enhancement and transfer of brain MRI images in DICOM format. It can be used for noise reduction and increasing image sharpness for non-contrast enhanced MRI images.
other_metrics: Noise reduction: average signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) increased by 40% or more compared to original images (acceptance criteria met). Sharpness increase: full width at half maximum (FWHM) of selected region of interest (ROI) decreased by 0.13% or more after SwiftMR application for at least 90% of test datasets (acceptance criteria met).
